objects.name: Analytic 1721
objects.description: From the defender view: a sandboxed process receives/creates a high-entropy Mach-O/bundle or encrypted segment, performs in-memory decrypt/unpack (mmap/mprotect RW→RX or RWX), optionally drops a transient image in app-writable dirs, then loads it through dyld/dlopen or spawns it. We correlate: (1) opaque blob write/arrival → (2) kernel memory protection changes → (3) dyld/dlopen from app-writable path or posix_spawn of a recently created image → (4) (optional) code-sign evaluation anomalies for the new image.

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: iOS:unifiedlog
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: Create/write of high-entropy Mach-O/bundle or generic blob in /var/mobile/Containers/Data/Application/<GUID>/(tmp|Library/Caches)/

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: iOS:unifiedlog
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: mmap/mprotect transitions to PROT_EXEC for pages associated with recently written files

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: iOS:unifiedlog
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: dlopen/image load from app-writable path (tmp, Caches) outside bundled resources

x_mitre_mutable_elements.description: Bundle IDs legitimately using JIT to avoid RWX false positives.
Regex for app-writable load paths (tmp, Caches) outside app bundle.
Tuning if enterprise/dev provisioning allows non-App Store binaries.
